title: Visual Entity Health Indicator
description: This is a Fabric mod, that displays the health of the entity that you are looking at, as vanilla hearts/absorption hearts, on your HUD (absorption hearts supported for players).
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Visual Entity Health Indicator** is a client-sided only Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that displays the **health** of the entity that you are targeting (looking at), as actual **player hearts** (**Absorption hearts** are only supported for players). The hearts are a NEW hud element, meaning your vanilla hearts aren't modified in any way. On top of the hearts, there is text, showing the name of the targeted entity. If the max HP &/or AHP (absorption HP) of the targeted entity exceeds 100 HP (50 hearts), then the text and heart HUD will be hidden, and an action bar message will appear, showing the health of the targeted entity numerically, along with the entity's name. The whole mod can be toggled with this command that the mod adds: **/toggleheartindicator**.

For a visual of this mod, please check out this mod's **[Gallery Tab](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/visual-entity-health-indicator/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you enjoy my work, please consider donating via a link on this page.
